content:
PR #17: Option 2 evidence bridge. New review-claim-gate export subcommand + auto-detect committed JSONL file at $CWD/.agent-grounding/evidence/<taskId>.jsonl. 13 new tests, 44/44 in review-claim-gate. Action.yml removed redundant mkdir workaround (evidence-ledger PR #15 covers it upstream).</content>
</invoke>

Reviewer (rigorous review subagent) APPROVE'd with 2 LOW findings. Both addressed in follow-up commit: (1) action.yml github-script now renders the evidenceSource label "(file: ...)" in the Check-Run summary — was promised in README but missing. (2) Inner package README updated with export subcommand, --evidence-file flag, and evidenceSource/evidenceFilePath in the JSON shape.

Back-compat verified: existing consumers of the JSON shape (Action github-script reading result.allowed/score/prerequisites) untouched. evidenceSource + evidenceFilePath are additive top-level fields. deriveEvidenceLogged refactor minimal — removed the now-unused try/finally since evidence-ledger's resetDb swallows close errors (per PR #15).
